meta.title: Optim: Smart management for insurance and bills in one place
meta.description: Manage your insurance and bills in one place. Renewal alerts, expense control and data export. Free and secure.
meta.ogTitle: Optim: Smart management for your insurance and bills
meta.ogDescription: The app that centralizes your policies, bills and recurring expenses. Never miss a renewal. Free, secure and with guaranteed export.

hero.title: Optim: Smart management for your insurance
hero.subtitle: Your policies, your bills and your alerts in one app. No surprises, no paperwork. You decide when to renew and how much to pay.
hero.trustedBy: Free, no subscription, free of intrusive ads

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Tools designed to simplify the management of your insurance and expenses every day.

items.title: Insurance Management
items.description: Centralize all your policies in a single dashboard. Home, car, life, health and more, always at a glance.

items.title: Renewal Alerts
items.description: Receive smart notifications before each renewal. Never be caught off guard by a renewal again.

items.title: Expense Analytics
items.description: Visualize how much you spend on insurance and subscriptions each month. Identify savings opportunities at a glance.

items.title: Multiple Providers
items.description: Compatible with any insurer or provider. Add your policies regardless of who issued them.

items.title: Secure & Private
items.description: Your data is protected with end-to-end encryption. Your information is yours and no one else's.

items.title: Recurring Expenses
items.description: Record services, subscriptions and any periodic expense. Always have total control of your finances.

howItWorks.title: Get started in minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No complications. In three steps you will have total control of your insurance and expenses.

steps.title: Download the app
steps.description: Available for free on Google Play. Install Optim in seconds and create your account.

steps.title: Add your policies
steps.description: Enter your insurance policies and recurring expenses. You only need the basic details for each policy.

steps.title: Get alerts and save
steps.description: Optim notifies you before each renewal and shows you where you can optimize your spending.

screenshots.title: Designed to be simple
screenshots.subtitle: A clean, intuitive interface that gives you control without overwhelming you with unnecessary information.

items.alt: Optim app dashboard: summary of active contracts and upcoming renewals
items.caption: Your summary at a glance. See how many contracts are active and which have an upcoming renewal.

items.alt: Contract list in Optim sorted by renewal date
items.caption: All your contracts at a glance. Sorted by renewal date so nothing slips through.

items.alt: Monthly and annual expense view in Optim, insurance and bill control
items.caption: Know your real spend. Monthly and estimated annual, so you can make informed decisions.

items.alt: Contract renewal screen in the Optim app
items.caption: Renew or modify with a tap. No paperwork, no hassle, done in seconds.

testimonials.title: What users are saying
testimonials.subtitle: People who manage their insurance and expenses with Optim.

items.quote: I finally know exactly how much I pay per year on insurance and utilities. Seeing the estimated annual spend in one panel has helped me organize my monthly budget much better.
items.author: Carlos R.

items.quote: I always missed the deadline to notify my car insurance and ended up renewing out of habit. With Optim's smart alerts, this time I was able to compare before it was too late.
items.author: Lucía M.

items.quote: I followed one of the app's energy-saving suggestions and now I pay €15 less per month. The app pays for itself with what it helps you save.
items.author: Jorge V.

items.quote: I've tried other finance apps but they were too complex. Optim is simple and straightforward: you add the contract, set the date, and forget about it. That easy.
items.author: Marta S.

items.quote: I was worried it wouldn't accept my policies from a small provider, but it works with any insurer. I've centralized everything from my bike insurance to my home broadband.
items.author: Andrés T.

items.quote: Having all my digital policies stored in the cloud and encrypted gives me peace of mind. I no longer have to hunt through folders for paperwork in an emergency.
items.author: Elena G.

items.quote: What I value most is that it's a clean tool with no ads. You can tell they care about privacy and that the focus is really on helping us manage our expenses.
items.author: Ricardo F.

items.quote: I use it to keep track of all my streaming and software subscriptions. I realised I was paying for two services I barely used. Essential!
items.author: Sara P.

serviceCategories.title: For all your recurring expenses
serviceCategories.subtitle: Not just insurance. Optim centralizes everything you pay periodically in one single place.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to what we're asked most.

items.question: Is it free?
items.answer: Yes. Optim is free to use. No subscription, no ads. We want you to have control of your insurance and bills without it costing you a penny.

items.question: Is it secure?
items.answer: Your data is safe. It's stored encrypted in the cloud and only you can access it. We don't sell or share your information with third parties for marketing. If at any time you want to take advantage of offers or additional services, we will only use your data with your explicit consent for that purpose.

items.question: Can I export my data?
items.answer: Yes. You can export your contracts and expenses to CSV or Excel whenever you want. Your data is yours: take it with you if you ever stop using the app.

cta.title: Start optimizing today
cta.subtitle: Take control of all your insurance and utilities. Free, no subscription, no ads.

footer.tagline: Manage your insurance and expenses with intelligence.
footer.cookieNotice: This site uses Plausible Analytics · no cookies · no personal data collected

about.metaDescription: Why we built Optim: technology with values so you can take back control of your insurance and recurring expenses.
about.title: About us
intro: Every year millions of people pay for services they no longer use simply because they forgot to cancel them.
At Optim we realised this doesn't happen for lack of interest, but for lack of control. Bills, insurance, subscriptions… everything gets lost among emails, paperwork and notifications nobody reads.
We decided to build a tool that actually works: one that gives you a clear view of your contracts, reminds you in time and lets you make decisions without stress or surprises.
valuesBody: We're not just a team of developers. We're professionals from different fields united by the same idea: technology should simplify life, not complicate it.
Every detail of Optim is designed to be useful, reliable and transparent. We want you to trust that nothing will slip through the cracks, and that every contract is under control.
about.commitmentBody: Optim is not just an app; it's our way of helping you regain peace of mind about your expenses. A tool that works for you, without noise or hassle.

sections.heading: 1. General Information (Art. 10 LSSI-CE)
sections.body:
This site is operated by José Miguel Vilata Martínez (NIF: 52649100F), owner of the domain getoptim.app and of the services offered through the website and the Optim application.

You can contact us at privacidad@getoptim.app for any legal, commercial or privacy matter.

This information is provided in compliance with Article 10 of Spanish Law 34/2002, of 11 July, on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE).

sections.heading: 2. Transparency in Commercial Communications
sections.body:
At getoptim.app we work with a lead generation and savings comparison model. In the future we may include affiliate links to insurers, utility companies or other providers.

When we do, we will do so transparently: any link that may earn us a commission will be clearly identified as such, and the offers we show you will be presented in a clear and distinct way. Our aim is that you always know who is addressing you and for what purpose.

sections.heading: 1. Who is responsible for your data?
sections.body: The data controller is José Miguel Vilata Martínez (NIF: 52649100F). You can contact us at privacidad@getoptim.app.

sections.heading: 2. What data do we collect and why?
sections.body:
For the app to work: your email to create your account and your policy data (provider, date and price) so we can send you renewal alerts.

To help you save: if you give your consent, we will use your data to send you news and personalised savings offers from partner third parties. When you generate a savings request (lead), the system stores an immutable snapshot of your policy data at that moment. That snapshot ensures the integrity of the commercial offer and consent traceability, and is not modified afterwards.

On the website: we use Plausible Analytics, a tool that does not use cookies and fully respects your privacy.

sections.heading: 3. Legal basis
sections.body:
• Service provision: performance of the contract accepted when you register (Art. 6.1.b GDPR).
  • Offers and commercial communications: explicit consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR), revocable at any time without affecting the basic service.

sections.heading: 4. Security and recipients
sections.body:
Your data is stored on Supabase and isolated by Row Level Security (RLS): at database level, each user can only access their own records. This technical security layer ensures privacy even in the event of failures or unauthorised access.

We never sell your data to third parties. We only share it with savings partners when you expressly request an offer, to manage that proposal.

sections.heading: 5. Your rights
sections.body:
You have full control. You can access, correct or delete your data, as well as withdraw your consent for commercial offers at any time from the app settings or by writing to us at privacidad@getoptim.app. We will respond within one month at the latest.

If you believe that the processing of your data breaches the regulations, you may lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Authority (AEPD) at www.aepd.es.

sections.heading: 6. Retention
sections.body: We keep your data while you use the app. If you request deletion, we will remove it within 30 days at the latest. In the event of a permanent closure of the platform, we will give you 30 days to download your information before full deletion.

sections.heading: 1. Welcome to Optim
sections.body: Optim is a tool designed to help you organise your insurance and recurring expenses (utilities, subscriptions, etc.). By using our app or the website getoptim.app, you accept these terms.

sections.heading: 2. What we do for you
sections.body:
We allow you to register your policies, view your expenses and receive alerts so you never miss a renewal.

Smart savings: To give you more value, Optim may present you with comparisons or better offers from partner third parties based on your data, whenever you give us your explicit permission.

Zero advertising vs. savings offers: Optim does not show intrusive third-party advertising (banners, pop-ups or spam). Personalised savings offers are a core feature of the optimisation service: we help you find better deals with partners when you request them. They are not considered targeted advertising but part of the product.

Service model: Currently, basic access is free. We reserve the right to introduce Premium features in the future, always notifying you in advance.

sections.heading: 3. Your responsibilities
sections.body: You own your information. You agree to enter accurate data. Optim is an organisation assistant; the final decision to take out or renew with a third party is always yours.

sections.heading: 4. Limitation of liability
sections.body:
Renewal alerts are a complementary support tool. We do our best to make them work, but we do not guarantee 100% delivery of notifications due to factors outside our control: device settings (permissions, battery saving), network or operating system failures.

You are the final legal responsibility for your contracts and for meeting deadlines with your providers. Optim helps you not forget; it does not replace your obligation to review and renew directly with each insurer or company.

sections.heading: 5. Our right to change or discontinue
sections.body:
Changes: We may modify these terms by notifying you 30 days in advance by email. Continued use of the service after that date implies acceptance of the new terms.

Permanent discontinuation: The service owner may discontinue the application at any time by giving users 30 days' notice by email. During that period, each user is guaranteed data portability by export in CSV or JSON format, so you lose nothing before closure.

sections.heading: 6. Governing law
sections.body: These terms are governed by Spanish law. If any dispute arises, it shall be resolved in the courts of the user's place of residence, in accordance with consumer and user protection regulations.
